title: Approve PROP-041-amendment-002-categories-FGH (all 5 Q-OP-A002 answers per tinker recommendations). Authorize operator + cowork-claude to apply Phase 2 (G+H, 8 patches + prereq) immediately when scheduled; Phase 2.1 (F, 9 patches) lands later after operator architecture audit of sections.json interaction model.
scope_authority: Operator approval directive only. Applying the patches is operator + cowork-claude work; this directive captures the decision record. Tinker does NOT re-author or modify amendment-002 — only mark it 'operator-approved' via the standard amendment-lifecycle additive-edit at next tinker run.
context: PROP-041-amendment-002-categories-FGH delivered by tinker-2026-05-16T17-47 (manual operator-triggered run). Status: implementation-pending-operator-review.

Amendment shape per tinker run summary: 17 patches across 5 files. Phase 2 (G+H) = 8 patches + prerequisite GH.0 (extend VALID_CATEGORIES const in audit-rewrite.js from ['A'..'E'] to ['A'..'H']). Phase 2.1 (F) = 9 patches.

4 new RWR rubric entries (RWR-10/11 for F, RWR-12 for G, RWR-13 for H). New audit-script checks C9-C12 (F), C13-C15 (G), C16-C18 (H). New RW state 'editorial-split-pending-operator' for F integration loop.

Regression check: 8 PASS (no NEVER_PUSH writers introduced, no append-only stable filename collisions, priority-queue writers field preserved, no conflicts with PROP-037/038/040, audit-script exit codes integrate cleanly, F's sections.json edits don't conflict with analyst conventions, schema extensions backward-compat).
Operator review completed 2026-05-16 ~17:50Z. Accepts all 5 Q-OP-A002 recommendations as written.

Q-OP-A002-1_phasing.answer: Phased: G+H first (Phase 2 immediate), F deferred to Phase 2.1
Q-OP-A002-1_phasing.rationale: Per tinker recommendation. G+H are mechanical extensions with no new file-ownership questions. F is architecturally invasive (sections.json schema, scores.json record-keeping, cooldown interaction). Splitting gives a clean rollback boundary if F's architecture audit reveals an issue. G addresses forward_references at 25% prevalence across below-floor surfaces — clear payoff.

Q-OP-A002-2_F_superseded_semantics.rationale: Per tinker recommendation. F-RW captures rewriter's split-proposal at draft time. If surface evolves, draft a new F-RW (cooldown 30d). Re-opening superseded RWs creates audit-trail ambiguity.

Q-OP-A002-3_G_preview_source_order.rationale: Per tinker recommendation. claim_tldr is the most concise authoritative form for WIN-targeted refs. Section <summary> tags are the natural preview for section-block refs. Operator can revise if early G-RWs surface a mismatch.

Q-OP-A002-4_D_C_mechanism_PROP_042.answer: Separate PROP-042-analyst-compression-mode (commissioned via DIRECTIVE-20260516-008 filed simultaneously with this directive)
Q-OP-A002-4_D_C_mechanism_PROP_042.rationale: Per tinker recommendation. Compression-mode is enough of a design surface (HNOTE-driven analyst mode, EXP authorship pattern, decider integration, content-preservation-without-string-match) that bundling into amendment-002 overloads scope. PROP-042 gets its own directive + design conversation.

Q-OP-A002-5_directive_006_coupling.rationale: Per tinker recommendation. F-RW HNOTEs land in monitor/decisions/human-notes.json (decider-side). DIRECTIVE-006 concerns monitor/analyst/human-notes.json priority (analyst-side). Separate queues. Tinker notes parallel-track dependency in amendment but solves dispatcher fix in PROP-NNN-analyst-operator-commission-priority (separate PROP from DIRECTIVE-006).

operator_intent: Tinker, at next run, marks PROP-041-amendment-002-categories-FGH status=operator-approved (with operator_decisions field populated from this directive). No further amendment authoring needed — this is the implementation patch set. Operator + cowork-claude applies Phase 2 (G+H) in a coordinated session matching the amendment-001 pattern. Phase 2.1 (F) lands after operator architecture audit.

tasks_for_tinker.description: Update PROP-041-amendment-002-categories-FGH file with: status='operator-approved', operator_approved_at=<now>, operator_approval_directive='DIRECTIVE-20260516-007', operator_decisions=<the 5 Q-OP-A002 answers from this directive>. Standard amendment-lifecycle additive-edit (mirrors PROP-041 amendment-001 lifecycle pattern).

After task_1 lands, mark this directive (DIRECTIVE-20260516-007) status=completed via the DIRECTIVE-LIFECYCLE additive-edit exception (status, completed_at, completed_by_run, prop_id_authored=null since this directive doesn't commission a new PROP, amendment_file_authored=null).
